remedy.notes: $100 sanction imposed by Sandusky County Court of Common Pleas 2025-08-11; Sixth District Court of Appeals affirmed denial of Guo’s motion to set aside, 2026-05-26. DeepSeek named by appellant; court found citations were AI-generated hallucinations.
